texto: Divinity never forces itself upon you. If you are willing, it is always there for you. If you are not willing, it is not there for you. So all you need to do is create the right kind of willingness and receptivity. Just to bow down and not have a will of your own is the biggest receptivity. It is the easiest way to receive.
explicacao: Citação de Sadhguruuru sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Divinity never forces itself upon you. If you are willing, it is always there for you. If you are…” articula autoestima, enlightenment, mysticism em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como mysticism.
